Patch Set 9: Code-Review-2

(6 comments)

The intention with the story really is to create a test model rather than add VFCs to the existing model at run time.
Perhaps I should have been more explicit in the story description.
Creating a separate test model allows us to validate the options that can be applied to different models that are not set on the SDC model.
Suggested approach for creating a test model: create a new docker image that contains the VFCs, configuration etc that comprise the model and deploys them in the same manner as the sdc-BE-init docker deploys the SDC model.
